user_query: 请将这段话翻译成中文：Stephanie Holdt studied international business administration and started her career in 2
crafted_request: 请将这段话翻译成中文：A person studied international business administration and started their career in 2003 at a company in the controlling division. In this role, they were responsible for various management
final_response: Stephanie Holdt 修读了国际商务管理专业，并于2003年在博世集团（Brose）的控制部门开启职业生涯。在此期间，她负责控制与财务领域的各项管理工作，直至2009年，期间在美国多个地点任职。随后，她转至克诺尔-布雷姆塞股份公司（Knorr-Bremse AG），在集团部门担任高级经理（Senior Manager, Corporate Controlling）直至2012年，之后又调
